Uses of Interface
org.apache.juneau.marshall.stream.RecordReader

Packages that use RecordReader
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.marshall.bson
BSON (Binary JSON) marshalling support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.cbor
CBOR (Concise Binary Object Representation) marshalling support per RFC 8949.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.csv
CSV Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.hjson
Hjson (Human JSON) format serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.hocon
HOCON (Human-Optimized Config Object Notation) format serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.ini
INI format serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.json
JSON Marshalling Support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.json5
JSON5 Marshalling Support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.json5l
JSON5L (JSON5 Lines) marshalling support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.jsonl
JSONL (JSON Lines) marshalling support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.markdown
Markdown serializer and parser support for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.marshaller
Marshallers
org.apache.juneau.marshall.msgpack
MessagePack Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.parquet
Apache Parquet serialization and parsing support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.plaintext
Plaintext Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.sse
Server-Sent Events (SSE) marshalling support — text/event-stream.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.stream
Public low-level token-streaming API (pull parser + push generator) shared by every Juneau format.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.toml
TOML v1.0.0 serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.uon
UON Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.xml
XML Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.yaml
YAML Marshalling Support

  • Uses of RecordReader in org.apache.juneau.marshall.bson

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.marshall.bson that return RecordReader
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    RecordReader
    BsonParser.parseArrayRecords(Object input)
    Convenience delegator for the buffered array-element RecordReader using default session arguments.
    RecordReader
    BsonParserSession.parseArrayRecords(Object input)
    Buffered array-element RecordReader for BSON, bound to this live session.
    RecordReader
    BsonParser.parseRecords(Object input)
    Convenience delegator for the whole-value RecordReader using default session arguments.
    RecordReader
    BsonParserSession.parseRecords(Object input)
    Opens a whole-value pull-parser cursor over a BSON document, bound to this live session.

    Classes in org.apache.juneau.marshall.cbor that implement RecordReader
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    CborTokenReader
    Reference implementation of the public TokenReader surface for the CBOR format (RFC 8949).
    Methods in org.apache.juneau.marshall.cbor that return RecordReader
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    RecordReader
    CborParser.parseArrayRecords(Object input)
    Convenience delegator for the streaming array-element RecordReader (uses default session args; see CborParser.parseTokens(Object)).
    RecordReader
    CborParserSession.parseArrayRecords(Object input)
    Streaming array-element RecordReader backed by CborTokenReader.

  • Uses of RecordReader in org.apache.juneau.marshall.marshaller

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.marshall.marshaller that return RecordReader
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    RecordReader
    Marshaller.readArrayRecords(Object input)
    Opens a RecordReader that yields each element of a top-level wire array as a separate record.
    RecordReader
    Marshaller.readRecords(Object input)
    Opens a low-level RecordReader cursor that yields each top-level value as a record.
    static RecordReader
    Bson.toArrayRecords(Object input)
    Opens a RecordReader that yields each element of a top-level wire array using the Bson.DEFAULT marshaller.
    static RecordReader
    Cbor.toArrayRecords(Object input)
    Opens a RecordReader that yields each element of a top-level wire array using the Cbor.DEFAULT marshaller.
    static RecordReader
    Html.toArrayRecords(Object input)
    Opens a RecordReader that yields each element of a top-level wire array using the Html.DEFAULT marshaller.
    static RecordReader
    Jcs.toArrayRecords(Object input)
    Opens a RecordReader that yields each element of a top-level wire array using the Jcs.DEFAULT marshaller.
    static RecordReader
    Json.toArrayRecords(Object input)
    Opens a RecordReader that yields each element of a top-level wire array using the Json.DEFAULT marshaller.
    static RecordReader

    Opens a RecordReader that yields each element of a top-level wire array using the Yaml.DEFAULT marshaller.
    static RecordReader

    Opens a low-level RecordReader cursor over the specified input using the Bson.DEFAULT marshaller.

  • Uses of RecordReader in org.apache.juneau.marshall.stream

    Subinterfaces of RecordReader in org.apache.juneau.marshall.stream
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    interface 
    TokenReader
    Public low-level pull-parser cursor over a Juneau-formatted document.
    Methods in org.apache.juneau.marshall.stream that return RecordReader
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static RecordReader
    RecordAdapter.arrayReader(ParserSession session, Object input)
    Creates an array-element RecordReader backed by a buffered list parse.
    RecordReader
    ArrayRecordReadable.parseArrayRecords(Object input)
    Opens a RecordReader that yields each element of a top-level wire array as a separate record.
    default RecordReader
    ArrayRecordReadable.parseArrayRecords(Object input, String rootElementName)
    Variant of ArrayRecordReadable.parseArrayRecords(Object) that accepts a caller-specified root element name.
    RecordReader
    RecordReadable.parseRecords(Object input)
    Opens a low-level RecordReader cursor over the specified input.
    default RecordReader
    TokenReadable.parseRecords(Object input)
    FULL formats get record semantics for free — a TokenReader IS-A RecordReader.
    static RecordReader
    RecordAdapter.reader(ParserSession session, Object input)
    Creates a single-shot RecordReader that delegates read(...) calls to the session's parse(...) entry point.
    static RecordReader
    StreamingArrayRecord.reader(TokenReader cursor)
    Wraps a TokenReader as a streaming array-element RecordReader.

    Method
    Description

    Convenience delegator for the buffered array-element RecordReader using default session arguments.

    Convenience delegator for the buffered array-element RecordReader with a caller-specified root element name, using default session arguments.

    Buffered array-element RecordReader for XML, bound to this live session.
    RecordReader

    Buffered array-element RecordReader that honors the caller-specified root element name.
    RecordReader
    XmlParser.parseRecords(Object input)
    Convenience delegator for the whole-value RecordReader using default session arguments.
    RecordReader
    XmlParserSession.parseRecords(Object input)
    Opens a whole-value pull-parser cursor over an XML document, bound to this live session.
